reference: Hello Doctor, I am eighteen years old. I have a gap between my two front teeth, and I am very conscious about it. I hate to smile, and I feel as if my teeth are the center of attention wherever I am. I suffer from anxiety and panic attacks. I am always worrying about it.
text: Hello doctor, I am 18 years old. I have a gap between my two front teeth and I am very conscious about it. I hate to smile and I feel as if my teeth are the center of attention wherever I am. I suffer from anxiety and panic attacks. I am always worrying about it.
